# PHIL.066 ? Social Contract Theory

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** modern_western

## Core Principles
Political legitimacy from agreement; state of nature hypothetical; consent as foundation; individual rights; limited government

## Application
Ground political authority in consent; hypothetical social contract; protect individual rights; government serves people; constitutional limits

## Key Values
- Consent
- Individual rights
- Limited government
- Contractual basis
